items.name: simplex-chat
items.description: SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!

descriptions.zh: SimpleX - 第一个无需任何类型的用户标识符即可运行的消息传递网络 - 设计为 100% 私密！ iOS、Android 和桌面应用程序📱！
descriptions.en: SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!

items.name: agency-agents
items.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

descriptions.zh: 触手可及的完整人工智能机构 - 从前端向导到 Reddit 社区忍者，从奇思妙想的注入者到现实检查者。每个代理都是一位具有个性、流程和经过验证的可交付成果的专业专家。
descriptions.en: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

descriptions.zh: 用于 GPU 的 NumPy 和 SciPy

items.name: FluidVoice
items.description: FluidVoice - Fastest macOS Offline Dictation app - Voice to Text fully Local. One ⭐ takes us a long way :))

descriptions.zh: FluidVoice - 最快的 macOS 离线听写应用程序 - 完全本地化的语音到文本。一个⭐让我们走了很长的路:))
descriptions.en: FluidVoice - Fastest macOS Offline Dictation app - Voice to Text fully Local. One ⭐ takes us a long way :))

items.name: maigret
items.description: 🕵️‍♂️ Collect a dossier on a person by username from 3000+ sites

descriptions.zh: 🕵️‍♂️ 从 3000 多个网站按用户名收集某人的档案
descriptions.en: 🕵️‍♂️ Collect a dossier on a person by username from 3000+ sites

items.name: openpilot
items.description: openpilot is an operating system for robotics. Currently, it upgrades the driver assistance system on 300+ supported cars.

descriptions.zh: openpilot 是一个机器人操作系统。目前，它升级了 300 多辆支持的汽车的驾驶员辅助系统。
descriptions.en: openpilot is an operating system for robotics. Currently, it upgrades the driver assistance system on 300+ supported cars.
